question_text: Do you feel heard when you express concerns?

Does your partner listen without interrupting?
Are misunderstandings clarified quickly?
Are conflicts resolved with mutual understanding?
Do arguments end in silence or stonewalling?
Do the same conflicts repeat without resolution?
Has either partner threatened to break up during fights?
Do conflicts escalate into personal attacks?
Can you apologize and forgive after disagreements?
